buyer_signals.hesitation_notes: Lisa asked about competitor pricing twice. Dan mentioned internal freeze on new vendors.
buyer_signals.exec_disengagement_notes: VP Ops joined 10 minutes late, left early. Did not confirm next steps.

transcript_summary: Call covered pricing and timeline. Buyer showed price sensitivity and mentioned a potential internal vendor freeze. Rep committed to follow-up materials but did not send them. No next meeting scheduled. Champion engagement dropped noticeably compared to previous calls.

rep_commitments: Schedule exec review call with COO
transcript_summary: Strong call. Champion very engaged. ROI model well-received. Rep committed to scheduling exec review — this was never followed up on after May 12 call.

rep_commitments: Follow up with legal team directly

buyer_signals.hesitation_notes: CRO mentioned CFO has not reviewed the contract yet. Legal team is backed up.
buyer_signals.scope_creep_notes: CRO asked about adding 5 more seats not in original proposal.

transcript_summary: CRO still engaged but flagged CFO not yet looped in on contract. Legal backlog causing delay. Scope expanded unexpectedly — rep did not address pricing impact. No urgency created around board meeting deadline.

rep_commitments: Respond to legal redlines by May 30
transcript_summary: Active deal in final stages. All stakeholders engaged. Delay purely procedural — legal redlines standard for healthcare. Strong buying intent confirmed. Likely a managed push, not a true slip.
